records.ety: [Cf. OF. debruisier to shatter, break. Cf. Bruise.]

defs: Surmounted by an ordinary; as, a lion is debruised when a bend or other ordinary is placed over it, as in the cut.
quotes: The lion of England and the lilies of France without the baton sinister, under which, according to the laws of heraldry, they where debruised in token of his illegitimate birth.
